extensionDescription.message: Privacy Magic apsaugo jus nuo priežiūros naršant žiniatinklyje.

settingsButton.description: Text for the settings button in the popup

safeLocalPage.description: Shown in the toolbar popup when the active tab is a local or restricted URL where per-site protections do not apply

advancedSettingsLink.description: Link in the toolbar popup to open the side panel with full site settings

doNotTrackEnabled.description: Label for the Do Not Track pref

thirdPartyCookiesAllowed.description: Label for the third-party cookies pref

hyperlinkAuditingEnabled.description: Label for the hyperlink auditing pref

topicsEnabled.description: Label for the Topics API pref

adMeasurementEnabled.description: Label for the Ad Measurement pref

relatedWebsiteSetsEnabled.description: Label for the Related Website Sets pref

webRTCIPHandlingPolicy.description: Label for the WebRTC IP handling policy pref

masterSwitch.description: Label for the master switch toggle

queryParameters.description: Setting to block tracking query parameters

doNotTrack.description: Setting to enable Do Not Track header

windowName.description: Setting to block window name tracking

websiteDefaultSettings.description: Title for website default settings section

gpc.description: Setting to enable global privacy control

battery.description: Setting to enable battery API fingerprinting protection

useragent.description: Setting to enable user-agent fingerprinting protection

alternateErrorPagesEnabled.description: Setting to enable alternate error pages

safeBrowsingExtendedReportingEnabled.description: Setting to enable safe browsing extended reporting

leakyFeatures.description: Category for leaky web features settings

display.description: Setting to block display preferences fingerprinting

device.description: Setting to block device version fingerprinting

memory.description: Setting to block device memory fingerprinting

disk.description: Setting to block disk space fingerprinting

gpu.description: Setting to block graphics chip fingerprinting

fonts.description: Setting to block fingerprinting of fonts on the device

cpu.description: Setting to block main chip fingerprinting

math.description: Setting to block math processing fingerprinting

touch.description: Setting to block touch support fingerprinting

network.description: Setting to block network information fingerprinting

policy.description: Category for privacy policy protection settings

welcomeHeading.description: Main heading on the welcome page

welcomeSubheading.message: Norėdami užbaigti nustatymą, atlikite šiuos greitus veiksmus.

welcomeStep1Title.message: Prisekite Privacy Magic prie įrankių juostos
welcomeStep1Title.description: Step 1 title on the welcome page

welcomePuzzleIconAlt.description: Alt text for puzzle icon in step 1

welcomeBrandName.description: Brand name shown in welcome content

welcomePinIconAlt.description: Alt text for pin icon in step 1

welcomePinActionImageAlt.message: Privacy Magic prisegimas prie įrankių juostos
welcomePinActionImageAlt.description: Alt text for pinning animation image

welcomeStep2Title.message: Paslėpkite savo IP adresą naudodami VPN
welcomeStep2Title.description: Step 2 title on the welcome page

welcomeStep2Body.message: Privacy Magic jus saugo naršyklės lygiu. Tačiau kiekviena jūsų lankoma svetainė ir kiekvienas joje įterptas sekiklis vis tiek gali matyti jūsų IP adresą, kuris gali atskleisti jūsų tapatybę ir vietą. Norėdami paslėpti savo IP adresą, jums reikės VPN.

welcomeSuggestedVpnDescription.message: Nepriklausomai audituotas, atvirojo kodo ir nerenka jūsų naršymo žurnalų. Vienas patikimiausių prieinamų VPN.

welcomeGetProtonVpnCta.description: Primary call to action for suggested VPN

welcomeAffiliateNote.message: Privacy Magic gauna komisinį atlygį, kuris padeda palaikyti mūsų darbą.

welcomeUseAnotherVpnCta.description: Secondary call to action for step 2

welcomeStep3Title.description: Step 3 title on the welcome page

welcomeStep3Intro.message: Let's make sure this browser doesn't send your browsing history to Google's servers.
welcomeStep3Intro.description: Introductory sentence for history sync setup panel (welcome flow)

welcomeStep3IntroSidepanelPending.message: We'll open the Sync settings page so you can make the necessary adjustments.
welcomeStep3IntroSidepanelPending.description: Intro text on sync help side panel before navigating to Chrome settings

welcomeStep3IntroSidepanel.message: Let's make sure this browser doesn't send your browsing history to Google's servers. We've opened the Sync settings page so you can make the necessary adjustments.
welcomeStep3IntroSidepanel.description: Intro paragraph for the history-sync help side panel (sync page open beside it)

welcomeStep3OpenSyncSettingsCta.description: Button to navigate the paired tab to Chrome sync settings

welcomeStep3BodyLead.message: Jei istorijos sinchronizavimas įjungtas, Chrome gali siųsti jūsų naršymo istoriją į Google serverius. Išjungus sinchronizavimą jūsų istorija išlieka privatesnė.

welcomeStep3BodyQuestion.message: Ar norite pagalbos išjungiant istorijos sinchronizavimą?

welcomeStep3SyncOptionInstruction.description: Instruction for selecting a sync option in step 3

welcomeStep3HistoryToggleInstruction.message: Next, under $sync_data$, click on $history$ to disable it (grey).
welcomeStep3HistoryToggleInstruction.description: Instruction for disabling History syncing in step 3

welcomeStep3AllDoneCta.description: Done button on history sync help side panel

welcomeShowMeCta.description: Primary call to action for step 3

welcomeHandleMyselfCta.description: Secondary call to action for step 3

welcomeInDevelopment.description: Message shown when the extension is in development

welcomeLetUsKnow.description: Message to ask for feedback on the extension

welcomeFooterCopyright.description: Copyright text in welcome page footer

welcomeSourceCodeLink.description: Label for source code link in welcome footer

welcomeStep1BodyWithIcons.message: Spustelėkite dėlionę {puzzleIcon} Chrome įrankių juostoje, kad pamatytumėte plėtinius. Sąraše raskite Privacy Magic ir spustelėkite šalia esantį smeigtuką {pinIcon}. Kai Privacy Magic mygtukas {hamsaIcon} bus prisegtas, galėsite jį spustelėti bet kada, kad pamatytumėte, kaip esate apsaugoti, ir valdytumėte atskiras apsaugas.
welcomeStep1BodyWithIcons.description: Step 1 body text with named icon tokens for i18n

welcomeCompletedSuffix.description: Suffix shown on a completed setup step
